channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19044] sanity-pcc test_3a: Crash at khugepaged
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f8f264f2-fd03-4517-a8f5-8700d5d86779

test_3a failed with the following error:

onyx-86vm7 crashed during sanity-pcc test_3a

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/113590 - 5.14.0-503.31.1.el9_5.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/113590 - 5.14.0-503.31.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

[ 3278.416363] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity-pcc test 3a: Repeat attach/detach operations === 20:04:52 (1747857892)
[ 3314.829626] watchdog: BUG: soft lockup - CPU#0 stuck for 23s! [khugepaged:44]
[ 3314.829701] Modules linked in: tls osp(OE) ofd(OE) lfsck(OE) mgc(OE) osd_ldiskfs(OE) lquota(OE) lustre(OE) mdc(OE) lov(OE) osc(OE) lmv(OE) fid(OE) fld(OE) ksocklnd(OE) ptlrpc(OE) obdclass(OE) lnet(OE) ldiskfs(OE) libcfs(OE) dm_flakey dm_mod rpcsec_gss_krb5 auth_rpcgss nfsv4 dns_resolver nfs lockd grace fscache netfs rfkill i2c_piix4 joydev virtio_balloon intel_rapl_msr intel_rapl_common pcspkr sunrpc drm fuse ext4 mbcache jbd2 ata_generic crct10dif_pclmul crc32_pclmul crc32c_intel virtio_net ata_piix ghash_clmulni_intel libata virtio_blk net_failover failover serio_raw
[ 3314.829802] CPU: 0 PID: 44 Comm: khugepaged Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OE     -------  ---  5.14.0-503.31.1_lustre.el9.x86_64 #1
[ 3314.829864] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[ 3314.829923] RIP: 0010:copy_mc_enhanced_fast_string+0x6/0xf
[ 3314.830052] Code: 89 ca e9 cd fe ff ff 66 66 2e 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 66 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 48 89 f8 48 89 d1 <f3> a4 31 c0 c3 cc cc cc cc 48 89 c8 c3 cc cc cc cc cc cc cc cc cc
[ 3314.830107] RSP: 0000:ffffa43a8016fc58 EFLAGS: 00010286
[ 3314.830164] RAX: ffff97aa3b118000 RBX: ffffe58740ec4600 RCX: 0000000000001000
[ 3314.830228] RDX: 0000000000001000 RSI: ffff97aa3db5d000 RDI: ffff97aa3b118000
[ 3314.830281] RBP: ffff97aa2cf8a000 R08: ffff97aa36b9ce40 R09: ffffe58740b3e268
[ 3314.830333] R10: ffff97aa2cf89000 R11: 000000000003a500 R12: ffff97aa2cf89000
[ 3314.830385] R13: ffff97aa36b9ce40 R14: ffffe58740b3e268 R15: ffff97aa2cf898c0
[ 3314.830438] FS:  0000000000000000(0000) GS:ffff97aabfc00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 3314.830499] CS:  0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[ 3314.830552] CR2: 00007fafc7efd024 CR3: 000000005be10004 CR4: 00000000003706f0
[ 3314.830606] DR0: 0000000000000000 DR1: 0000000000000000 DR2: 0000000000000000
[ 3314.830659] DR3: 0000000000000000 DR6: 00000000fffe0ff0 DR7: 0000000000000400
[ 3314.830712] Call Trace:
[ 3314.830764]  <IRQ>
[ 3314.830840]  ? show_trace_log_lvl+0x1c4/0x2df
[ 3314.830935]  ? show_trace_log_lvl+0x1c4/0x2df
[ 3314.830990]  ? __collapse_huge_page_copy.isra.0+0x6f/0x1c0
[ 3314.831071]  ? watchdog_timer_fn+0x1ad/0x210
[ 3314.831148]  ? __pfx_watchdog_timer_fn+0x10/0x10
[ 3314.831203]  ? __hrtimer_run_queues+0x112/0x2b0
[ 3314.831271]  ? hrtimer_interrupt+0xfc/0x210
[ 3314.831324]  ? kvm_sched_clock_read+0xd/0x20
[ 3314.831426]  ? __sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x4e/0x100
[ 3315.507083]  ? sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x6d/0x90
[ 3315.507138]  </IRQ>
[ 3315.507189]  <TASK>
[ 3315.507241]  ? asm_sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x16/0x20
[ 3315.507330]  ? copy_mc_enhanced_fast_string+0x6/0xf
[ 3315.507385]  __collapse_huge_page_copy.isra.0+0x6f/0x1c0
[ 3315.507440]  collapse_huge_page+0x4e7/0x740
[ 3315.507506]  hpage_collapse_scan_pmd+0x470/0x870
[ 3315.507562]  khugepaged_scan_mm_slot.constprop.0+0x2a3/0x520
[ 3315.507617]  khugepaged+0xdd/0x200
[ 3315.507672]  ? __pfx_khugepaged+0x10/0x10
[ 3315.507726]  kthread+0xe0/0x100
[ 3315.507799]  ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
[ 3315.507853]  ret_from_fork+0x2c/0x50
[ 3315.507917]  </TASK>
[ 3315.507976] Kernel panic - not syncing: softlockup: hung tasks
[ 3315.903332] CPU: 0 PID: 44 Comm: khugepaged Kdump: loaded Tainted: G           OEL    -------  ---  5.14.0-503.31.1_lustre.el9.x86_64 #1
[ 3315.905173] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM, BIOS 0.5.1 01/01/2011
[ 3315.906044] Call Trace:
[ 3316.596916]  <IRQ>
[ 3316.597274]  dump_stack_lvl+0x34/0x48
[ 3316.969009]  panic+0x107/0x2bb
[ 3316.970290]  watchdog_timer_fn.cold+0xc/0x16
[ 3317.120865]  ? __pfx_watchdog_timer_fn+0x10/0x10
[ 3317.121587]  __hrtimer_run_queues+0x112/0x2b0
[ 3317.122258]  hrtimer_interrupt+0xfc/0x210
[ 3317.122879]  ? kvm_sched_clock_read+0xd/0x20
[ 3317.123537]  __sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x4e/0x100
[ 3317.124306]  sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x6d/0x90
[ 3317.125041]  </IRQ>
[ 3317.125368]  <TASK>
[ 3317.125701]  asm_sysvec_apic_timer_interrupt+0x16/0x20
[ 3317.126480] RIP: 0010:copy_mc_enhanced_fast_string+0x6/0xf
[ 3317.127313] Code: 89 ca e9 cd fe ff ff 66 66 2e 0f 1f 84 00 00 00 00 00 66 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 90 48 89 f8 48 89 d1 <f3> a4 31 c0 c3 cc cc cc cc 48 89 c8 c3 cc cc cc cc cc cc cc cc cc
[ 3317.130097] RSP: 0000:ffffa43a8016fc58 EFLAGS: 00010286
[ 3317.130881] RAX: ffff97aa3b118000 RBX: ffffe58740ec4600 RCX: 0000000000001000
[ 3317.131952] RDX: 0000000000001000 RSI: ffff97aa3db5d000 RDI: ffff97aa3b118000
[ 3317.133028] RBP: ffff97aa2cf8a000 R08: ffff97aa36b9ce40 R09: ffffe58740b3e268
[ 3317.134089] R10: ffff97aa2cf89000 R11: 000000000003a500 R12: ffff97aa2cf89000
[ 3317.135153] R13: ffff97aa36b9ce40 R14: ffffe58740b3e268 R15: ffff97aa2cf898c0
[ 3317.136213]  __collapse_huge_page_copy.isra.0+0x6f/0x1c0
[ 3317.137014]  collapse_huge_page+0x4e7/0x740
[ 3317.137657]  hpage_collapse_scan_pmd+0x470/0x870
[ 3317.138353]  khugepaged_scan_mm_slot.constprop.0+0x2a3/0x520
[ 3317.139211]  khugepaged+0xdd/0x200
[ 3317.139736]  ? __pfx_khugepaged+0x10/0x10

[ 3317.140834]  ? __pfx_kthread+0x10/0x10
[ 3317.141411]  ret_from_fork+0x2c/0x50
[ 3317.141967]  </TASK>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity-pcc test_3a - onyx-86vm7 crashed during sanity-pcc test_3a

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
